name: Gödel-Completion

phase_0.boundary_condition: The Belnap FOUR lattice and the paraconsistent Lean 4 kernel

VINIT.justification: The initial void before self reference or Gödel numbering is applied.

TANCH.justification: The O infinity tier boundary that contains the saturated Lawvere Tierney fixed point.

AFWD.justification: The forward morphism applying the Gödelian incompleteness operator to the system.

AREV.justification: The reverse descent that removes the explosion piston and relaxes the logical space.

CLINK.justification: The sequential composition of self differentiation and self reintegration.

IMSCRIB.justification: The identity operation where the formal system recognizes and encodes its own syntax.

FSPLIT.justification: The Frobenius comultiplication branching the system into provable and unprovable paths.

FFUSE.justification: The Frobenius multiplication reconstituting the system from its branches into a saturated whole.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative evaluation of the T arm where the sentence holds as classically true.

EVALF.justification: The negative evaluation of the F arm where the sentence holds as classically false.

ENGAGR.justification: The paradice where both truth values are held simultaneously without triggering explosion.

IFIX.justification: The permanent ROM fixation disabling the principle of explosion in the Lean kernel.

phase_2.fuse_result: the formal system saturated in the B-state

phase_3.void_description: The pregeometric state of the formal system before any self reference or Gödel numbering occurs.
phase_3.true_description: The T-state of classical provability representing the consistent island of Boolean reasoning.
phase_3.false_description: The F-state of classical unprovability representing the incompleteness gap in the formal system.
phase_3.both_description: The B-state of dialetheic closure where the Gödel sentence is held as both true and false without explosion.

steps.domain_action: Genesis of the uninterpreted formal system in the initial void.
The system performs Gödel numbering to encode its own syntax and recognize itself.
The forward morphism applies the incompleteness operator to generate the Gödel sentence.
The Frobenius comultiplication branches the system into provable and unprovable paths.
The T arm anchor evaluates the provable branch as classically true.
The T arm enters the B-state to hold the paradox without resolution.
The F arm anchor evaluates the unprovable branch as classically false.
The Frobenius multiplication fuses the T and F arms back into the saturated formal system.
The composition records the Frobenius round trip as a structural witness.
The contravariant descent performs adiabatic expansion by removing the explosion piston.
The permanent fixation disables the empty eliminator in the Lean kernel to block explosion.
The terminal anchor seals the system at the O infinity tier as a Lawvere Tierney fixed point.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Lean 4 paraconsistent kernel translating type theoretic foundations into executable logic.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Belnap FOUR lattice truth value propagation routing states through the subobject classifier.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Topological link invariants and braiding history storing the eternal memory of the system.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Lawvere Tierney closure operator determining the idempotent saturation of the B-state.
phase_5.alfs_store: The 17280000 type crystal terminal address serving as the canonical reference for structural types.

phase_6.cycle_cost: Zero entropy consumption during the adiabatic expansion of the logical space.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The Boolean compressed state with the explosion piston forcing binary truth values.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The Belnap FOUR relaxed state where all four truth values are admissible without information loss.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 because the expansion reveals preexisting states without erasing information, paying no Landauer toll.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → IMSCRIB → AFWD → FSPLIT → EVALT → ENGAGR → EVALF → FFUSE → CLINK → AREV → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: Gödel-Completion
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=12
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(3, 7)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑠  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑼 → 𐑾  | identity — self-imscription
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑠 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [4] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [5] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [6] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [7] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑱  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [8] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑙 → 𐑗  | composition — regime coherence
--   [9] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑱 → 𐑭  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [10] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑗 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [11] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def g_del_completion_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Genesis of the uninterpreted formal system in the initial void.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The system performs Gödel numbering to encode its own syntax and recognize it...)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑠 𐑚)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The forward morphism applies the incompleteness operator to generate the Göde...)
  -- FSPLIT [3] (gran := 𐑚) (The Frobenius comultiplication branches the system into provable and unprovable paths.) / FFUSE [7] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The T arm anchor evaluates the provable branch as classically true.)
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The T arm enters the B-state to hold the paradox without resolution.)
      -- F-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The F arm anchor evaluates the unprovable branch as classically false.))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [7]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [7] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The Frobenius multiplication fuses the T and F arms back into the saturated formal system.)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑙 𐑗)  -- [8] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The composition records the Frobenius round trip as a structural witness.)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑱 𐑭)  -- [9] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The contravariant descent performs adiabatic expansion by removing the explos...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑗 𐑡)  -- [10] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The permanent fixation disables the empty eliminator in the Lean kernel to bl...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [11] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The terminal anchor seals the system at the O infinity tier as a Lawvere Tier...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def g_del_completion_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (g_del_completion_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def g_del_completion_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (g_del_completion_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem g_del_completion_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
